description: This is my first problem, comments welcome since i'm only 20k at the time i submit it. In the game i lost by 2.5 moku because i failed this corner (A stone) right in the fuseki and let it this way the whole game. Then in yose i came back to it with no success. So i studied it and here come this problem.
